## Documentation change

- Registry entry or document ID:
- Change type: clarification / correction / decision change / generated refresh
- Controlling source changed:
- Required reviewers:

## Checks

- [ ] I edited the canonical source, not a generated output.
- [ ] I updated every affected flow, contract, model, plan or QA reference.
- [ ] I recorded material decisions or reviews in `governance/review-log.md`.
- [ ] I ran `node scripts/validate-docs.js`.
- [ ] I regenerated affected outputs and their `--check` command passes.
- [ ] I did not add secrets or sensitive data.
